summary.key_theme: 市場對於 JFrog 在 AI 代理與軟體供應鏈安全領域的技術擴張持正面態度，儘管估值與成長放緩仍引發部分分析師擔憂。

bullish.title: Guggenheim Initiates Coverage On JFrog with Buy Rating, Announces Price Target of $60
bullish.reason: Guggenheim 分析師 Howard Ma 給予買入評級並設定 60 美元目標價，顯示機構投資人對其長期成長潛力具備信心，此消息直接推動股價上漲。

bullish.title: JFrog Announces New JFrog Agent Skills Registry For Agentic Workforces To Operate Securely At Enterprise Speed And Scale
bullish.reason: 推出 Agent Skills Registry 強化了企業級 AI 代理的安全性與治理能力，有助於鞏固其在 DevOps 市場的競爭護城河。

bullish.title: Why JFrog (FROG) Stock Is Up Today
bullish.reason: 總結了當日股價上漲的市場情緒，主要歸因於分析師評級調升與新產品發布帶來的正面市場反應。

bearish.title: JFrog: Still More Premium To Burn As Growth Decelerates
bearish.reason: 分析指出儘管年初至今股價已下跌 30 %，但成長動能減緩與過高的估值倍數仍使該股面臨進一步下行風險。

bearish.title: Assessing JFrog (FROG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility Without A Clear News Catalyst
bearish.reason: 針對近期股價波動進行評估，指出在缺乏明確利多消息下，市場對其估值合理性存在疑慮。

neutral.title: JFrog Says AI Coding Agents Won’t Replace Binary Security as Xray and Cloud Usage Surge
neutral.reason: 強調 AI 代理無法取代二進位安全需求，顯示公司核心業務與新興 AI 技術為互補關係，對股價影響中性偏多。

neutral.title: How The JFrog (FROG) Narrative Is Shifting With AI Tools And Diverging Analyst Views
neutral.reason: 探討市場對 JFrog 敘事邏輯的轉變，指出分析師觀點分歧，反映出市場對其轉型 AI 的不確定性。

neutral.title: JFrog shares are trading higher after Guggenheim initiated its coverage on the stock with a Buy rating and announced a price target of $60.
neutral.reason: 此篇為 Guggenheim 評級報告的重複報導，選取作為代表性新聞的補充，確認了市場對該評級的即時反應。
